title: AnswerLog
description: Runner -> Brain. Immutable, append-only, the SOURCE OF TRUTH. The runner only ever WRITES this; the brain only ever READS it. The graph is re-derivable from these logs. See docs/02-technical-approach.md §5.

persona_id.description: The inferred role; prototype maps 1:1 from participant.

participant_id.description: The real person/device (UUID or chosen name).

thread_id.description: Open-thread this entry addresses, or null for free narration.

agent_utterance.description: What the agent said (null for free narration).

raw_answer.description: Verbatim transcript — the permanent truth; a misheard word is corrupted forever.

audio_ptr.description: Optional pointer to the recorded audio blob.
